'''鈭歝h-ch-p''' ('''kachachap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeroise|zeroise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeroise|zeroise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-ch-p
|-
! Lemma
| kachachap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichachap|thichachap]] || [[word:jichachap|jichachap]] || [[word:shichachap|shichachap]] || [[word:kichachap|kichachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchachap|thuthuchachap]] || [[word:jujuchachap|jujuchachap]] || [[word:shushuchachap|shushuchachap]] || [[word:kukuchachap|kukuchachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchachap|thuchachap]] || [[word:juchachap|juchachap]] || [[word:shuchachap|shuchachap]] || [[word:kuchachap|kuchachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchachap|thuchachap]] || [[word:juchachap|juchachap]] || [[word:shuchachap|shuchachap]] || [[word:kuchachap|kuchachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechachap|thechachap]] || [[word:jechachap|jechachap]] || [[word:shechachap|shechachap]] || [[word:kechachap|kechachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochachap|thothochachap]] || [[word:jojochachap|jojochachap]] || [[word:shoshochachap|shoshochachap]] || [[word:kokochachap|kokochachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochachap|thochachap]] || [[word:jochachap|jochachap]] || [[word:shochachap|shochachap]] || [[word:kochachap|kochachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochachap|thochachap]] || [[word:jochachap|jochachap]] || [[word:shochachap|shochachap]] || [[word:kochachap|kochachap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]] || [[word:chachap|chachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chachap|th忙chachap]] || [[word:j忙chachap|j忙chachap]] || [[word:sh忙chachap|sh忙chachap]] || [[word:k忙chachap|k忙chachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachachap|thathachachap]] || [[word:jajachachap|jajachachap]] || [[word:shashachachap|shashachachap]] || [[word:kakachachap|kakachachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachachap|thachachap]] || [[word:jachachap|jachachap]] || [[word:shachachap|shachachap]] || [[word:kachachap|kachachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachachap|thachachap]] || [[word:jachachap|jachachap]] || [[word:shachachap|shachachap]] || [[word:kachachap|kachachap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachachap|shachachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachachap|goshachachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachachap|gokishachachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachachapn眉|shachachapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachachapnkn眉|goshachachapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachachapn眉|gokishachachapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachachapsh毛|shachachapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachachapnksh毛|goshachachapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachachapsh毛|gokishachachapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachachapro|shachachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachachapnkro|goshachachapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachachapro|gokishachachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachachapmu|shachachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachachapnkmu|goshachachapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachachapmu|gokishachachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachachapsher|shachachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachachapnksher|goshachachapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachachapsher|gokishachachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachachapng|shachachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachachapnkng|goshachachapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachachapng|gokishachachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachachapya|shachachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachachapnkya|goshachachapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachachapya|gokishachachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachachapyam|shachachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachachapnkyam|goshachachapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachachapyam|gokishachachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachachapn眉sh毛|shachachapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachachapnkn眉sh毛|goshachachapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachachapn眉sh毛|gokishachachapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachachapn眉ro|shachachapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachachapnkn眉ro|goshachachapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachachapn眉ro|gokishachachapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachachapn眉mu|shachachapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachachapnkn眉mu|goshachachapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachachapn眉mu|gokishachachapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachachapsh毛n眉|shachachapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachachapnksh毛n眉|goshachachapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachachapsh毛n眉|gokishachachapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachachapsh毛ro|shachachapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachachapnksh毛ro|goshachachapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachachapsh毛ro|gokishachachapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachachapsh毛mu|shachachapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachachapnksh毛mu|goshachachapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachachapsh毛mu|gokishachachapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachachapron眉|shachachapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachachapnkron眉|goshachachapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachachapron眉|gokishachachapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachachaprosh毛|shachachaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachachapnkrosh毛|goshachachapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachachaprosh毛|gokishachachaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachachapromu|shachachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachachapnkromu|goshachachapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachachapromu|gokishachachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachachapmun眉|shachachapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachachapnkmun眉|goshachachapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachachapmun眉|gokishachachapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachachapmush毛|shachachapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachachapnkmush毛|goshachachapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachachapmush毛|gokishachachapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachachapmuro|shachachapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachachapnkmuro|goshachachapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachachapmuro|gokishachachapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
